# CRS Documentation Review — 2026-05-22

## Scope

- **Repository:** `octopus-components-registry-service`
- **Base branch audited:** `origin/v3` at commit `230b0e51`
- **Audit pass:** `docs/review-pass`
- **Audited tree:**
  - `DOCS.md`, `AGENTS.md`, `README.md` (repo root)
  - `docs/configuration.adoc`
  - `docs/doc-improvement-concept.md`
  - `docs/db-migration/**` — README, PRD, FS, NFS, TDD, schema-spec, api-compat-deltas, requirements-{common,migration,resolver}, compat-residual-clusters, ft-db-testing-plan, implementation-progress, todo, t4x-subagent-brief, doc-improvement-concept; 15 ADRs (000–014); 11 tech-debt entries (001–011); deployment/{README, dev-run, local-postgres, keycloak-setup, claude-subagent-brief, references/*}; prototypes/*.html

Paths below are plain code-style paths, not links — they describe the pre-rename state and must not resolve as live links in this historical record.

## A→B narrative health

The PRD, ADR-000, ADR-007, ADR-012 already articulate the A→B story strongly:

- **A:** Git-based DSL store, `EscrowConfigurationLoader`, 34 v1/v2/v3 endpoints, no UI, no audit trail, no Keycloak.
- **B:** PostgreSQL store with schema v2 (Model A'), API v4 CRUD with Keycloak `@PreAuthorize`, audit log + domain events, per-component `component_source` routing, extracted Spring Cloud Gateway BFF + Vite SPA in `octopus-components-management-portal`.

After cleanup, the entry-point readers should follow is `docs/registry/README.md` → `prd.md` → `technical-design.md` → ADR by interest. Cold-read test must pass on this path before requesting external review.

## Considered-Alternatives backfill

| ADR | Backfill | Source / evidence |
|---|---|---|
| ADR-007 (Component-Source Routing) | Add Caffeine in-process cache to "Considered Options" (or a new "Subsequently rejected refinements" sub-heading). Rationale: was implemented inside `ComponentSourceRegistry`, removed by SYS-032 due to multi-pod inconsistency (pod A's rename invisible to pod B for the cache TTL). | SYS-032 history; pre-rewrite of `ComponentSourceRegistry` |
| ADR-009 (UI Repository Strategy — Superseded) | Expand supersession marker: "Option B-2 (monorepo embedded JAR) was recommended in this ADR but the team chose Option A (separate repo) in April 2026 because of OAuth2 BFF separation concerns and Vite+Gradle integration friction. See ADR-012 for the new decision." | ADR-012 §"Why Option B-2 was reversed"; PR #147 commit `26278f29` |
| ADR-010 (Schema Extensibility — Superseded by ADR-014) | Enrich supersession marker with the audit finding "zero JSONB operators (`@>`, `->`, `?`) used in production after one year; GIN indexes never hit." | ADR-014 §Context |
| ADR-014 (Schema v2) | **No content edit.** Alternatives Considered already covers Models A/B/C/D/A'. Only path-only edit in Commit 1 (drop `implementation-progress.md` link) and status promotion in Commit 4. | n/a |

## Cleanup punch-list

Mapped to commits in the docs/review-pass PR:

1. **Commit 1** — Delete `implementation-progress.md`, `todo.md`, `doc-improvement-concept.md`. Move `t4x-subagent-brief.md` and `deployment/claude-subagent-brief.md` to `.claude/agents/`. Reframe `requirements-migration.md` intro. Apply all wayfinding rewrites in `DOCS.md`, `AGENTS.md` (three sections), `schema-spec.md` line 4, `ADR-013` line 101, `ADR-014` line 107, `technical-design.md` line 97, `requirements-resolver.md` line 206, `tech-debt/{009,010,011}`, `deployment/README.md` line 11. Apply comment-only code edits in `GitVsDbValidationTest.kt`, `ComponentManagementServiceImpl.kt`, `ImportServiceImpl.kt`.

2. **Commit 2** — Strip V1..V6 narrative from `schema-spec.md` lines 12–20. Delete diagrams rows from README "Planned" table.

3. **Commit 3** — Back-fill Considered Alternatives in ADR-007 (Caffeine cache), ADR-009 (supersession), ADR-010 (supersession).

4. **Commit 4** — Promote ADR-014 to Accepted referencing PR #191 (`1eaa3dde`) + PR #192 (`65ccaca3`). ADR-013 stays Proposed.

5. **Commit 5** — `git mv docs/db-migration docs/registry`. Rewrite all path references catalogued in the §"Reference sweep — Pattern `docs/db-migration`" table above. Run post-rename `git grep "docs/db-migration"` — expect zero hits outside this file.

## Verification expected to pass after PR

- `git ls-files '*.md' '*.adoc'` link-integrity scan: green.
- `git grep "docs/db-migration"`: zero hits outside this audit file.
- `git log --follow docs/registry/adr/007-dual-read-migration.md`: walks back through old path.
- Cold-read of `docs/registry/README.md` → PRD → TDD → ADR-007: a new reviewer can follow the A→B story without external context.
- `./gradlew build` with `AUTH_SERVER` env and `-x` for docker / oc / automation:test: green.
